changes.value:
## What
The CI pipeline (`/.github/workflows/ci.yml`) runs on self-hosted runners with no rust-analyzer installed. LSP integration tests skip silently when it's missing. Add `rustup component add rust-analyzer` to the CI setup so LSP tests actually run.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CI installs rust-analyzer before running tests
- [ ] LSP tests that previously skipped now execute in CI
- [ ] CI still passes (no new failures from LSP tests)

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo nextest run` in CI includes LSP test results (not skipped)
- [ ] `test_lsp_server_startup` runs and passes in CI"
CI: install rust-analyzer in test pipeline
